# CLKComplicationTemplateGraphicRectangularTextGaugeView

**Class**

A template for displaying a header row with a SwiftUI view and text, a second row of text, and a gauge.

## Declaration

```swift
final class CLKComplicationTemplateGraphicRectangularTextGaugeView<Label> where Label : View
```

## Overview

This template belongs to the [doc://com.apple.clockkit/documentation/ClockKit/CLKComplicationFamily/graphicRectangular] family. [/documentation/clockkit/clkcomplicationtemplategraphicrectangulartextgaugeview#3667408] shows the layout of the complication and where it appears on the clock face.



The following table lists the dimensions of the SwiftUI view displayed by this template.



## Creating the Template

- **init(headerLabel:headerTextProvider:bodyTextProvider:gaugeProvider:)**: Creates a new template that has a header row with a SwiftUI view and text, body text, and a gauge.

## Accessing the Content

- **headerLabel**: The SwiftUI view displayed by the template.
- **headerTextProvider**: The header text to display in the complication.
- **bodyTextProvider**: The main body text to display in the complication.
- **gaugeProvider**: The gauge to display in the complication.

## Rectangular templates

- **CLKComplicationTemplateGraphicRectangularStandardBodyView**: A template for displaying a SwiftUI label and up to three rows of text.
- **CLKComplicationTemplateGraphicRectangularLargeView**: A template for displaying a large rectangle containing header text and a SwiftUI view.
- **CLKComplicationTemplateGraphicRectangularFullView**: A template for displaying a SwiftUI view that fills the entire template.

## Inherits From

- CLKComplicationTemplate

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSCopying
- NSObjectProtocol
